data.name: Add Global Password
data.value: Add Global Password

data.name: Add New Roles
data.value: Add New Roles

data.name: Add New Users
data.value: Add New Users

data.name: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line.
data.value: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line.

data.name: Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.
data.value: Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.

data.name: Allows creating and managing onboarding task templates for new employees.
data.value: Allows creating and managing onboarding task templates for new employees.

data.name: Allows creating new global passwords that can be shared with others.
data.value: Allows creating new global passwords that can be shared with others.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information.

data.name: Allows issuing and managing payroll slips for all users.
data.value: Allows issuing and managing payroll slips for all users.

data.name: Allows managing and deleting any global password created by any user.
data.value: Allows managing and deleting any global password created by any user.

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items.
data.value: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items.

data.name: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.
data.value: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, resetting user passwords, and viewing sensitive user details like payroll.
data.value: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, resetting user passwords, and viewing sensitive user details like payroll.

data.name: Allows printing employment and income certificates for any employee.
data.value: Allows printing employment and income certificates for any employee.

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.
data.value: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.
data.value: Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.

data.name: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.
data.value: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all users.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of all users.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.

data.name: Allows viewing the operation logs of any user, including their bank card change history.
data.value: Allows viewing the operation logs of any user, including their bank card change history.

data.name: Allows viewing the report line of any user, including their manager, subordinates, and peers.
data.value: Allows viewing the report line of any user, including their manager, subordinates, and peers.

data.name: Allows viewing, editing, and deleting any user's SSH keys.
data.value: Allows viewing, editing, and deleting any user's SSH keys.

data.name: Approve Any Leave
data.value: Approve Any Leave

data.name: Assign Roles to Users
data.value: Assign Roles to Users

data.value: Delete Roles

data.value: Delete Users

data.name: Edit and View Details of Users
data.value: Edit and View Details of Users

data.name: Edit Role Information
data.value: Edit Role Information

data.name: Grants permission to create new roles.
data.value: Grants permission to create new roles.

data.name: Grants permission to create new user accounts.
data.value: Grants permission to create new user accounts.

data.name: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.
data.value: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.

data.name: Manage Any Password
data.value: Manage Any Password
